notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, shortstop Jared Triolo to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman hit by pitch. Andy Pages to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy plunked
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy hit by pitch. Freddie Freeman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Mitch Keller. Andy Pages scores. Freddie Freeman to 3rd. Mookie Betts to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Brandon Lowe. Alex Call scores.

notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal singles on a line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum. Dalton Rushing to 3rd. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Evan Sisk. Dalton Rushing scores. Miguel Rojas to 3rd. Santiago Espinal to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Kyle Tucker to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Kyle Tucker scores.

notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jared Triolo out at 2nd. Brandon Lowe out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jared Triolo out at 2nd. Brandon Lowe out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ryan Ward. Bryan Reynolds to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler Callihan walks. Spencer Horwitz to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler Callihan triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
